title: Channel Policy Router - Wave 4 SLA & Safety

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM commands WHERE site_id = '${site_id}' AND status = 'sla_breached' AND updated_at >= now() - interval '24 hour';

SELECT date_trunc('minute', updated_at) - ((EXTRACT(minute from updated_at)::int % 15) * interval '1 minute') AS time, COUNT(*)::bigint AS breaches FROM commands WHERE site_id = '${site_id}' AND status = 'sla_breached' AND updated_at >= now() - interval '24 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('hour', reconciled_at) AS time, percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (reconciled_at - dispatched_at))) AS p50, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (reconciled_at - dispatched_at))) AS p95 FROM commands WHERE site_id = '${site_id}' AND reconciled_at IS NOT NULL AND dispatched_at IS NOT NULL AND reconciled_at >= now() - interval '7 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*)::bigint AS rejected_503 FROM commands WHERE site_id = '${site_id}' AND status = 'rejected_queue_saturated' AND created_at >= now() - interval '7 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE attempt_count > 0)::bigint AS retried_events, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL)::bigint AS delivered_events FROM incident_hook_events WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 day' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
